title: DataQualityAI
intent: Data quality rule authoring, drift detection, and automated remediation recommendations
requirements: rules module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
profiling module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
validation module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
drift module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
issues module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
remediation module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
